description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college.Height: 17" Width: 12" Depth: 7" Capacity: 25 litresMade of polyester and nylon, with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a velcro flap pocket and a protected ear phone unit One front zippered compartment with multiple pouches Synthetic padded haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles and ergonomically padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries nike branding in screen print on the front and right handle, with a swoosh badge appliqued onto the front zippered pocket for styleCareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
